sectionTitle: What changed beyond the sales office

primary.headline: 6,200-home master planned community sold for development near Niederwald
primary.summary: Wilson Capital has acquired The Ridge, a 1,736 acre site near Niederwald, south of Austin and east of Kyle, from Walton Global. Plans call for more than 6,200 single family homes plus 60 acres of commercial and multifamily, 119 acres of parks, and 57 acres reserved for Hays CISD school sites. First America Homes and Hakes Brothers are the named builders, with residential construction expected to begin in late 2026.
primary.buyerImplication: This is long term supply, not something you can buy today. More planned rooftops along SH 21 and SH 130 tends to mean more builder competition in that corridor over the next several years, and two builders new to our coverage area are attached to it.
primary.buyerAction: No immediate action. We are adding The Ridge and both named builders to the development watchlist and will report when models or pricing appear.
primary.confidence: Reported by trade press from a Newmark press release; not yet field verified
